_comment: Single source of truth for the type labels stride applies to every card it creates, so a card's shape is visible on the board. Bug-template cards get Bug, epic parent issues get Epic, standard stories get Issue. `provision-labels` creates the missing ones idempotently; /linear:setup runs it; /linear:check reports missing ones as drift (linear_cli.py label-drift --team <TEAM>). Labels are team-scoped in Linear. Adapting stride to a workspace that names its type labels differently is an edit to this one file.
